disputed_language: A Security Hub CSPM central configuration policy applies in the home Region and every linked Region; it cannot be scoped to only a subset of that linked-Region set.
explanation: AWS states the no-subset rule but immediately identifies an exception: with central configuration, controls involving global resources are automatically disabled in every Region except the home Region. Omitting that exception makes the region behavior materially incomplete for question design.
required_action: Add the documented global-resource-control exception and the opt-in-Region enablement condition where applicable.
suggested_revision: A central configuration policy otherwise takes effect in the home and all linked Regions and cannot target only a subset; controls involving global resources are automatically disabled outside the home Region, and opt-in Regions must be enabled per account before policy application.

supporting_source.locator: Designate a home Region, especially the global-resource controls exception
supporting_source.title: Enabling central configuration in Security Hub CSPM
